[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110000 3
1 1000101 3
2 1110011 5
3 0000111 3
4 1110011 5
5 1110110 5
6 1101011 5
7 0110110 4

12 21 1000000 1

45 54 0110110 4 match 7
56 65 0100010 2
67 76 0000000 a
70 07 0000100 1
